svg.title: Istio microservices traffic flow diagram
svg.desc: Shows how external requests flow through the Istio ingress gateway, frontend, api-gateway, and orders-service v1/v2 with mTLS enforced throughout

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What initiates the request to the Istio ingress gateway?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Istio Gateway and VirtualService in frontend-gateway.yaml')
sendPrompt('What does the frontend service do in this setup?')
sendPrompt('What role does the api-gateway play and what does it call?')
sendPrompt('How does the canary VirtualService split traffic between v1 and v2?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about orders-service v1 — replicas and image')
sendPrompt('Tell me about orders-service v2 — replicas and canary role')
sendPrompt('How does PeerAuthentication STRICT mTLS work in Istio?')
g.text: PeerAuthentication: STRICT mTLS across all services (peerauth-strict.yaml)
